title: Desire
tmdbOverview: In a social context deteriorated by a countrywide economic crisis, the life of several people will be turned upside down after they meet Cécile, a character who symbolizes desire.
synopsis: Desire is a 2011 drama and romance film from France. It has a 5.4 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
